Student Capacity

A Home Away From Home

UGIP provides separate, well-maintained hostel facilities for boys and girls. Surrounded by the serene hills of Nainital, our hostels offer an ideal environment for academic focus and personal growth. We prioritize the safety, health, and comfort of every resident.

Hostel Amenities

🛏️

Furnished Rooms

Well-ventilated and spacious rooms provided with a bed, study table, chair, and personal almirah.

🍲

Nutritious Mess

Hygienic dining facility serving balanced, nutritious vegetarian meals four times a day.

📶

24/7 Wi-Fi

High-speed internet access across the hostel premises to support academic research and projects.

🛡️

Security & CCTV

Round-the-clock security guards and comprehensive CCTV surveillance ensuring student safety.

🏥

Medical Assistance

First-aid facilities on campus and an emergency vehicle tied up with the nearest city hospital.

⚽

Recreation Room

Common room equipped with a TV, indoor games like table tennis, and daily newspapers.

Hostel Rules & Regulations

To maintain a disciplined and harmonious environment, residents must adhere to the following rules:

  • Strictly maintain silence during the designated study hours (9:00 PM to 11:00 PM).
  • Hostel gates close promptly at 8:00 PM. Late entry requires prior written permission from the Warden.
  • Ragging is strictly prohibited and falls under our Zero Tolerance Policy.
  • Outsiders/Visitors are not allowed inside the hostel residential blocks.
  • Use of heavy electrical appliances (heaters, iron plates) in rooms is forbidden.
  • Maintain cleanliness in rooms and common areas. Property damage will incur strict fines.

Hostel Fee Structure

Room Rent (per month) ₹500 – ₹800
Mess Charges (per month) ₹2,000 – ₹2,500
Security Deposit (Refundable) ₹2,000
Electricity & Water As per usage
Wi-Fi Charges Included

* Fees are subject to minor revisions. Contact the administration desk for the most accurate and latest rates.

Contact Hostel Warden
